title: Choke Artist of the Decade
blurb: Reached the final more times than anyone alive. Won it exactly zero times. We admire the consistency.

title: Most Hydrated Player
blurb: Nobody has ever seen this man's hands empty. Somehow throws better after noon.

title: Loudest Trash Talker
blurb: Backs it up about 60% of the time, which is honestly higher than expected.

title: Perennial Almost-Champion
blurb: Always a bridesmaid. The most feared runner-up in tournament history.

title: The Poopsie Belly-Bump Award
blurb: For the player who celebrates the hardest — bag in, bump out. In honor of Grandpa's favorite victory move.

title: The Airmail Special
blurb: Holds the unofficial record for most bags thrown clean over the board and into the lake.
